build.buildCommand: npm install && npx prisma generate && npm run build

deploy.startCommand: npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --skip-generate && node prisma/seed.js || true && cp -r .next/static .next/standalone/.next/static && cp -r public .next/standalone/public 2>/dev/null; PORT=${PORT:-3000} node .next/standalone/server.js
